meta.title: Discourse & Cohesion
meta.description: Learn advanced techniques for creating cohesive, well-structured discourse.
meta.description_ko: 응집력 있고 잘 구조화된 담화를 만드는 고급 기법을 학습합니다.

explanation.en: 'Anaphora' refers back to something mentioned earlier: 'Tom arrived. He was late.' — 'He' is anaphoric.
explanation.ko: 'anaphora'는 앞서 언급된 것을 받는 표현.

choices: 앞서 언급된 것을 대신 받는 표현

explanation.en: 'This outcome' = anaphoric reference back to the project's failure.
explanation.ko: 'This outcome' = 프로젝트 실패를 다시 받는 조응적 표현.

questions.prompt: The project failed. This _____ came as a surprise to everyone.

explanation.en: 'Cataphora' = reference to something that appears later in the text.
explanation.ko: 'cataphora' = 텍스트에서 나중에 나오는 것을 미리 받는 표현.

choices: 뒤에 올 내용을 미리 받는 것

explanation.en: 'Having said that' = cohesive device acknowledging a point before contrasting.
explanation.ko: 'having said that' = 이전 요점을 인정한 후 대조하는 응집 장치.

questions.answer: Having said that, we must also acknowledge the limitations.

explanation.en: 'Nonetheless' = despite this; expresses contrast with previous statement.
explanation.ko: 'nonetheless' = 그럼에도 불구하고; 이전 진술과 대조.

questions.prompt: The policy had many strengths. _____, its implementation proved challenging.

explanation.en: Ellipsis = omission of words understood from context: 'She can swim and so can he [swim].'
explanation.ko: ellipsis = 맥락에서 이해되는 단어 생략.

explanation.en: Ellipsis with auxiliary: 'I might do [come]' — the main verb is omitted.
explanation.ko: 조동사를 이용한 생략: 'I might do [come]' — 본동사 생략.

explanation.en: Cohesive devices that create reference links in text.
explanation.ko: 텍스트에서 참조 링크를 만드는 응집 장치.

pairs: 앞서 언급된 두 항목 각각 지칭

explanation.en: 'The latter' refers to the second of two previously mentioned items (inflation).
explanation.ko: 'the latter'는 앞서 언급된 두 항목 중 두 번째(인플레이션)를 지칭.

questions.prompt: The report highlighted two key issues: unemployment and inflation. The _____ has risen sharply this year.

explanation.en: 'As mentioned earlier' = backward-pointing cohesive device referencing previously stated info.
explanation.ko: 'as mentioned earlier' = 이전에 언급된 정보를 참조하는 후방 지시 응집 장치.

explanation.en: 'The former' = the first of two groups. More precise than 'The first' for two items.
explanation.ko: 'the former' = 두 그룹 중 첫 번째. 두 항목에는 'the former'가 더 정확.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The study examined two groups: young adults and elderly. The first were given the treatment.'

explanation.en: 'Broadly speaking' = when speaking in general terms; not being precise.
explanation.ko: 'broadly speaking' = 일반적으로 말할 때.

questions.prompt: The results were inconclusive. _____ speaking, more research is needed.

explanation.en: 'Other things being equal' = absolute clause used as a qualifying device.
explanation.ko: 'other things being equal' = 한정 장치로 사용되는 독립 분사 구문.

questions.answer: Other things being equal, the first option is preferable.

explanation.en: 'In turn' = as a result of this; a consequence.
explanation.ko: 'in turn' = 이에 따라; 결과.

questions.prompt: The company has grown rapidly. _____, it has faced increasing regulatory scrutiny.

explanation.en: Substitution: 'did so' replaces 'wrote a report' to avoid repetition.
explanation.ko: 대체: 'did so'는 반복을 피하기 위해 'wrote a report'를 대신.

choices: 'Tom wrote a report and Mary did so too.'

explanation.en: 'To summarise' = cohesive device signalling a summary of the discussion.
explanation.ko: 'to summarise' = 논의 요약을 알리는 응집 장치.

questions.prompt: To _____ what has been discussed, the main argument is that education reform is urgently needed.

explanation.en: 'With regard to' = concerning; introduces a new aspect of the topic.
explanation.ko: 'with regard to' = ~에 관하여; 주제의 새로운 측면을 도입.

choices: 주제 전환 또는 새 측면 도입

explanation.en: 'Profound implications' = deep and significant consequences.
explanation.ko: 'profound implications' = 깊고 중요한 결과.

questions.prompt: The findings have _____ implications for public health policy.

explanation.en: 'It is worth noting that' = cohesive phrase introducing an important point.
explanation.ko: 'it is worth noting that' = 중요한 요점을 소개하는 응집 표현.

questions.answer: It is worth noting that dropout rates have declined.

explanation.en: 'Indeed' = strengthens or confirms the previous statement.
explanation.ko: 'indeed' = 이전 진술을 강화하거나 확인.

questions.prompt: The debate continues; _____, there appears to be no easy solution.

explanation.en: Without a topic sentence, a paragraph lacks direction and coherence.
explanation.ko: 주제문 없이는 단락에 방향성과 응집력이 부족.

explanation.en: 'Despite + noun/gerund' = contrast despite difficulties.
explanation.ko: 'despite + 명사/동명사' = 어려움에도 불구한 대조.

questions.prompt: _____ the challenges faced, the results achieved were remarkable.

explanation.en: 'On balance' = considering everything; overall conclusion.
explanation.ko: 'on balance' = 모든 것을 고려하면; 전체적인 결론.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: So what's the main conclusion? B: _____, the evidence suggests that early intervention is key.'

explanation.en: 'Whether' introduces an indirect question/noun clause.
explanation.ko: 'whether'는 간접 의문문/명사절을 이끕니다.

questions.prompt: The research raises profound questions about _____ artificial intelligence can truly replicate human creativity.

explanation.en: Formal discourse markers for academic and professional writing.
explanation.ko: 학술 및 전문 글쓰기를 위한 격식체 담화 표지.
